---
applyTo: '**'
---

# Global Project Instructions

- Preserve trauma-sensitive UX and copy in all changes.
- Keep code strongly typed and modular.
- Prefer small focused files and clear naming.
- Run `npm run lint` and `npm run typecheck` before completing significant work.
- Use Conventional Commits when committing (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`).
- Do not introduce Cloudflare Pages deploy commands.
- Frontend + backend deployment is Cloudflare Workers only.
